questions.question: What is the difference between @Controller and @RestController?
options: @RestController only handles REST-style URLs; @Controller handles any URL
@RestController adds @ResponseBody to every method, serializing return values to JSON instead of resolving view names
@Controller is for class-level mapping; @RestController is for method-level mapping
@RestController automatically validates request bodies; @Controller does not

Where should the @Valid annotation be placed to trigger Bean Validation on a request body?
options: On the @RequestBody parameter in the controller method
On the service method that receives the DTO
